water.name: Catnip Reservoir
aliases: Catnip Reservoir, tributaries and outlet stream

authorities.name: U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Catnip Reservoir, tributaries and outlet stream: Open year around. Daily: 1 trout. Possession: 2 trout. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Catnip Reservoir — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: The only fish species present in the lake is Lahontan cutthroat trout. Catnip Reservoir is located in northern Washoe County on the Sheldon National Wildlife Refuge administered by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service. Stocking Updates: 2023 Cutthroat Trout, 6.8 in, 05-06-2026; 3000 Cutthroat Trout, 6.0 in, 06-03-2025; 3018 Cutthroat Trout, 7.1 in, 06-03-2025; 2044 Cutthroat Trout, 7.7 in, 06-18-2024; 100 Cutthroat Trout, 6.0 in, 06-01-2023.

sources.title: Nev. Admin. Code § 503.504(3)(b)(1) — Western Region: restrictions on bait and lures
sources.quotedText: Only artificial lures with single barbless hooks may be used in: (1) Catnip Reservoir; ...

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County, Catnip Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Catnip Reservoir, its tributaries, and outlet stream are open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: The entire limit is trout (Lahontan cutthroat trout is the only species present).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County, Catnip Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 1 trout; possession limit 2 trout at Catnip Reservoir.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County, Catnip Reservoir
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is permitted any hour of the day or night at Catnip Reservoir.
regulations.verbatimText: Any hour of the day or night.

parameters.note: Applies to the reservoir; this special-regulation restriction protects the resident genetically significant Lahontan cutthroat trout population.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with a single barbless hook may be used at Catnip Reservoir; no bait.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with single barbless hooks may be used in: (1) Catnip Reservoir;

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
